qa_pairs.question: Which modules need to be loaded for older BUSCO versions?
What other software packages are loaded when the necessary BUSCO modules are loaded?
qa_pairs.answer: Loading the necessary modules for BUSCO also loads modules for Augustus, BLAST+, HMMER, and some other software packages that BUSCO relies upon.

qa_pairs.question: How can I copy the default BUSCO configuration file for older versions?
qa_pairs.answer: You can copy the default configuration file by running `cp -v $EBROOTBUSCO/config/config.ini.default $HOME/busco_config.ini`.

qa_pairs.question: Is there an alternative method to get the BUSCO configuration file for older versions?
qa_pairs.answer: Yes, you can also download it using `wget -O $HOME/busco_config.ini https://gitlab.com/ezlab/busco/raw/master/config/config.ini.default`.

qa_pairs.question: Where should the BUSCO configuration file be saved?
qa_pairs.answer: The BUSCO configuration file should be copied or downloaded to your home directory, named `busco_config.ini`.
